377:   def calculate_dominant_color!(local_path = nil)
378:     color = nil
379: 
380:     color = "" if !FileHelper.is_supported_image?("image.#{extension}") || extension == "svg"
381: 
382:     if color.nil?
383:       local_path ||=
384:         if local?
385:           Discourse.store.path_for(self)
386:         else
387:           Discourse.store.download(self)
388:         end
389: 
390:       if local_path.nil?

392:         color = ""
393:       end

395:       color ||=
396:         begin
397:           data =
398:             Discourse::Utils.execute_command(
399:               "nice",
400:               "-n",
401:               "10",
402:               "convert",
403:               local_path,
404:               "-depth",
405:               "8",
406:               "-resize",
407:               "1x1",
408:               "-define",
409:               "histogram:unique-colors=true",
410:               "-format",
411:               "%c",
412:               "histogram:info:",

414:             )
415: 
416:           # Output format:

422: 
423:           color

427:           # an empty string to prevent re-evaluation
428:           ""

430:     end

500:     secure_status_did_change = self.secure? != mark_secure
501:     self.update(secure_params(mark_secure, reason, source))
502: 
503:     if secure_status_did_change && Discourse.store.external?
504:       Discourse.store.update_upload_access_control(self)

533:   def self.migrate_to_new_scheme(limit: nil)
534:     problems = []
535: 
536:     DistributedMutex.synchronize("migrate_upload_to_new_scheme") do
537:       if SiteSetting.migrate_to_new_scheme
538:         max_file_size_kb = [
539:           SiteSetting.max_image_size_kb,
540:           SiteSetting.max_attachment_size_kb,
541:         ].max.kilobytes
542: 
543:         local_store = FileStore::LocalStore.new
544:         db = RailsMultisite::ConnectionManagement.current_db
545: 
546:         scope =
547:           Upload
548:             .by_users
549:             .where("url NOT LIKE '%/original/_X/%' AND url LIKE ?", "%/uploads/#{db}%")
550:             .order(id: :desc)
551: 
552:         scope = scope.limit(limit) if limit
553: 
554:         if scope.count == 0
555:           SiteSetting.migrate_to_new_scheme = false
556:           return problems
557:         end
558: 
559:         remap_scope = nil
560: 
561:         scope.each do |upload|
562:           begin
563:             # keep track of the url
564:             previous_url = upload.url.dup
565:             # where is the file currently stored?
566:             external = previous_url =~ %r{\A//}
567:             # download if external
568:             if external
569:               url = SiteSetting.scheme + ":" + previous_url
570: 
571:               begin
572:                 retries ||= 0
573: 
574:                 file =
575:                   FileHelper.download(
576:                     url,
577:                     max_file_size: max_file_size_kb,
578:                     tmp_file_name: "discourse",
579:                     follow_redirect: true,
580:                   )
581:               rescue OpenURI::HTTPError
582:                 retry if (retries += 1) < 1
583:                 next
584:               end
585: 
586:               path = file.path
587:             else
588:               path = local_store.path_for(upload)
589:             end
590:             # compute SHA if missing
591:             upload.sha1 = Upload.generate_digest(path) if upload.sha1.blank?
592: 
593:             # store to new location & update the filesize
594:             File.open(path) do |f|
595:               upload.url = Discourse.store.store_upload(f, upload)
596:               upload.filesize = f.size
597:               upload.save!(validate: false)
598:             end
599:             # remap the URLs
600:             DbHelper.remap(UrlHelper.absolute(previous_url), upload.url) unless external
601: 
602:             DbHelper.remap(
603:               previous_url,
604:               upload.url,
605:               excluded_tables: %w[
606:                 posts
607:                 post_search_data
608:                 incoming_emails
609:                 notifications
610:                 single_sign_on_records
611:                 stylesheet_cache
612:                 topic_search_data
613:                 users
614:                 user_emails
615:                 draft_sequences
616:                 optimized_images
617:               ],
618:             )
619: 
620:             remap_scope ||=
621:               begin
622:                 Post
623:                   .with_deleted
624:                   .where(
625:                     "raw ~ '/uploads/#{db}/\\d+/' OR raw ~ '/uploads/#{db}/original/(\\d|[a-z])/'",
626:                   )
627:                   .select(:id, :raw, :cooked)
628:                   .all
629:               end
630: 
631:             remap_scope.each do |post|
632:               post.raw.gsub!(previous_url, upload.url)
633:               post.cooked.gsub!(previous_url, upload.url)
634:               if post.changed?
635:                 Post.with_deleted.where(id: post.id).update_all(raw: post.raw, cooked: post.cooked)
636:               end
637:             end
638: 
639:             upload.optimized_images.find_each(&:destroy!)
640:             upload.rebake_posts_on_old_scheme
641:             # remove the old file (when local)
642:             FileUtils.rm(path, force: true) unless external
643:           rescue => e
644:             problems << { upload: upload, ex: e }
645:           ensure
646:             file&.unlink
647:             file&.close
648:           end
649:         end
650:       end
651:     end
652: 
653:     problems
654:   end

3: module HasUrl
4:   extend ActiveSupport::Concern

6:   class_methods do
7:     def extract_url(url)
8:       url.match(self::URL_REGEX)
9:     end
10: 
11:     def extract_sha1(path)
12:       data = extract_url(path)
13:       return if data.blank?
14: 
15:       sha1 = data[2]
16:       return if sha1&.length != Upload::SHA1_LENGTH
17: 
18:       sha1
19:     end
20: 
21:     def get_from_url(url)
22:       return if url.blank?
23: 
24:       uri =
25:         begin
26:           URI(UrlHelper.unencode(url))
27:         rescue URI::Error
28:         end
29: 
30:       return if uri&.path.blank?
31:       data = extract_url(uri.path)
32: 
33:       if data.blank?
34:         result = nil
35:         result ||= self.find_by(url: uri.path)
36:         return result
37:       end
38: 
39:       result = nil
40: 
41:       if self.name == "Upload"
42:         sha1 = data[2]
43:         result = self.find_by(sha1: sha1) if sha1&.length == Upload::SHA1_LENGTH
44:       end
45: 
46:       result || self.find_by("url LIKE ?", "%#{data[1]}")
47:     end
48: 
49:     def get_from_urls(upload_urls)
50:       urls = []
51:       sha1s = []
52: 
53:       upload_urls.each do |url|
54:         next if url.blank?
55: 
56:         uri =
57:           begin
58:             URI(UrlHelper.unencode(url))
59:           rescue URI::Error
60:           end
61: 
62:         next if uri&.path.blank?
63:         urls << uri.path
64: 
65:         if data = extract_url(uri.path).presence
66:           urls << data[1]
67:           sha1s << data[2] if self.name == "Upload"
68:         end
69:       end
70: 
71:       self.where(url: urls).or(self.where(sha1: sha1s))
72:     end

10: 
11:   skip_before_action :preload_json,
12:                      :check_xhr,
13:                      :redirect_to_login_if_required,
14:                      :redirect_to_profile_if_required,
15:                      only: %i[show show_short _show_secure_deprecated show_secure]
16:   protect_from_forgery except: :show

25:   def create
26:     # capture current user for block later on
27:     me = current_user
28:     RateLimiter.new(
29:       current_user,
30:       "uploads-per-minute",
31:       SiteSetting.max_uploads_per_minute,
32:       1.minute,
33:     ).performed!
34: 
35:     type =
36:       if params[:upload_type].presence
37:         params[:upload_type]
38:       elsif params[:type].presence
39:         Discourse.deprecate(
40:           "the :type param of `POST /uploads` is deprecated, use the :upload_type param instead",
41:           since: "3.4",
42:           drop_from: "3.5",
43:         )
44:         params[:type]
45:       else
46:         params.require(:upload_type)
47:       end
48:     # 50 characters ought to be enough for the upload type
49:     type = type.parameterize(separator: "_")[0..50]
50: 
51:     if type == "avatar" &&
52:          (
53:            SiteSetting.discourse_connect_overrides_avatar || SiteSetting.auth_overrides_avatar ||
54:              !me.in_any_groups?(SiteSetting.uploaded_avatars_allowed_groups_map)
55:          )
56:       return render json: failed_json, status: :unprocessable_entity
57:     end
58: 
59:     url = params[:url]
60:     file = params[:file] || params[:files]&.first
61:     pasted = params[:pasted] == "true"
62:     for_private_message = params[:for_private_message] == "true"
63:     for_site_setting = params[:for_site_setting] == "true"
64:     site_setting_name = for_site_setting ? params[:site_setting_name] : nil
65:     is_api = is_api?
66:     retain_hours = params[:retain_hours].to_i
67: 
68:     # note, atm hijack is processed in its own context and has not access to controller
69:     # longer term we may change this
70:     hijack do
71:       begin
72:         info =
73:           UploadsController.create_upload(
74:             current_user: me,
75:             file:,
76:             url:,
77:             type:,
78:             for_private_message:,
79:             for_site_setting:,
80:             site_setting_name:,
81:             pasted:,
82:             is_api:,
83:             retain_hours:,
84:           )
85:       rescue => e
86:         render json: failed_json.merge(message: e.message&.split("\n")&.first),
87:                status: :unprocessable_entity
88:       else
89:         render json: UploadsController.serialize_upload(info), status: Upload === info ? 200 : 422
90:       end
91:     end
92:   end

94:   def lookup_urls
95:     params.permit(short_urls: [])

97: 
98:     if (params[:short_urls] && params[:short_urls].length > 0)
99:       PrettyText::Helpers
100:         .lookup_upload_urls(params[:short_urls])
101:         .each do |short_url, paths|

109:   def show
110:     # do not serve uploads requested via XHR to prevent XSS
111:     return xhr_not_allowed if request.xhr?
112: 
113:     return render_404 if !RailsMultisite::ConnectionManagement.has_db?(params[:site])
114: 
115:     begin
116:       request_site_current_user =
117:         request.env.delete(Auth::DefaultCurrentUserProvider::CURRENT_USER_KEY)
118: 
119:       RailsMultisite::ConnectionManagement.with_connection(params[:site]) do |db|
120:         begin
121:           # current_user here refers to the user for the site that we are operating on
122:           # using with_connection. If DB for the target site matches the current site
123:           # for the request, then current_user will be the same as the request_site_current_user
124:           return render_404 if SiteSetting.prevent_anons_from_downloading_files && current_user.nil?
125: 
126:           upload =

131:             if !Discourse.store.internal?
132:               local_store = FileStore::LocalStore.new
133:               return render_404 unless local_store.has_been_uploaded?(upload.url)
134:             end
135: 
136:             send_file_local_upload(upload)

138:             render_404
139:           end
140:         end
141:       end

152:

155:     if upload = Upload.find_by(sha1: sha1)
156:       return handle_secure_upload_request(upload) if upload.secure? && SiteSetting.secure_uploads?
157:

176:   def show_secure
177:     # do not serve uploads requested via XHR to prevent XSS
178:     return xhr_not_allowed if request.xhr?
179: 
180:     path_with_ext =
181:       params[:extension].nil? ? params[:path] : "#{params[:path]}.#{params[:extension]}"
182:     upload = upload_from_path_and_extension(path_with_ext)
183: 
184:     return render_404 if upload.blank?
185: 
186:     return render_404 if SiteSetting.prevent_anons_from_downloading_files && current_user.nil?
187:     return handle_secure_upload_request(upload, path_with_ext) if SiteSetting.secure_uploads?
188: 
189:     # we don't want to 404 here if secure uploads gets disabled
190:     # because all posts with secure uploads will show broken media
191:     # until rebaked, which could take some time
192:     #
193:     # if the upload is still secure, that means the ACL is probably still
194:     # private, so we don't want to go to the CDN url just yet otherwise we
195:     # will get a 403. if the upload is not secure we assume the ACL is public
196:     signed_secure_url =
197:       Discourse.store.signed_url_for_path(
198:         path_with_ext,
199:         filename: upload.original_filename,
200:         include_content_disposition: true,
201:       )
202:     redirect_to upload.secure? ? signed_secure_url : Discourse.store.cdn_url(upload.url),
203:                 allow_other_host: true
204:   end

206:   def handle_secure_upload_request(upload, path_with_ext = nil)
207:     check_secure_upload_permission(upload)
208: 
209:     # defaults to public: false, so only cached by the client browser
210:     cache_seconds =
211:       SiteSetting.s3_presigned_get_url_expires_after_seconds - SECURE_REDIRECT_GRACE_SECONDS
212:     expires_in cache_seconds.seconds
213: 
214:     # url_for figures out the full URL, handling multisite DBs,
215:     # and will return a presigned URL for the upload
216:     if path_with_ext.blank?
217:       return(
218:         redirect_to Discourse.store.url_for(upload, force_download: force_download?),
219:                     allow_other_host: true
220:       )
221:     end
222: 
223:     redirect_to Discourse.store.signed_url_for_path(
224:                   path_with_ext,
225:                   expires_in: SiteSetting.s3_presigned_get_url_expires_after_seconds,
226:                   force_download: force_download?,
227:                   filename: upload.original_filename,
228:                   include_content_disposition: true,
229:                 ),
230:                 allow_other_host: true
231:   end
